scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish -w packages/contracts --access public && npm publish -w packages/client --access public && npm publish -w packages/server --access public
scripts.docs:generate: npm run docs:readmes && npm run docs:api
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p example-app/tsconfig.json --noEmit
